batch.jobdefinition.ekshostpath.CfnAbout: Specifies the configuration of a Kubernetes `hostPath` volume. A `hostPath` volume mounts an existing file or directory from the host node's filesystem into your pod. For more information, see [hostPath](https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes/

batch.jobdefinition.ekshostpath.Path.Description: The path of the file or directory on the host to mount into containers on the pod.
